description: Accumulate a4/ .md edits during a session (PostToolUse), validate them at Stop, and sweep records at SessionStart/SessionEnd. Session-scoped record at .claude/tmp/a4-edited/a4-edited-<session_id>.txt avoids re-reporting pre-existing violations in files the user did not touch. On SessionStart, also refresh UC `implemented_by:` reverse-links via `scripts/refresh_implemented_by.py` so drift from cross-branch edits or manual task edits is reconciled before work begins. Separately, report cross-file status consistency mismatches on SessionStart and after any a4/ .md edit (non-blocking, informational). Status transitions and their supersedes/discarded/revising cascades run synchronously from `scripts/transition_status.py` inside the invoking skill/agent — there are no status-writer hooks.

hooks.description: Record edited a4/*.md files to a session-scoped list
Validate all a4/ files edited this session; exit 2 on violations to force fix
Delete this session's a4-edited record file
Sweep orphan a4-edited record files older than 1 day
Refresh UC implemented_by reverse-links before the session begins
Report cross-file status-consistency mismatches at session start
